data.name: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control
LIFT：用大批量 SAC 预训练 + 物理先验世界模型微调，把人形 sim-to-real 压到 1 小时

data.description: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control提及近端策略优化（PPO）。
LIFT：用大批量 SAC 预训练 + 物理先验世界模型微调，把人形 sim-to-real 压到 1 小时引用Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control。
Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control使用软演员-评论家（SAC）。
